description: ESR (Engineering State Runtime) hooks — injects current state at session start

hooks.command: export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _C="${CODEX_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.codex}"; _E="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; _P=$({ [ -n "$_E" ] && printf '%s\n' "$_E"; ls -dt "$_C/plugins/cache/pi-esr"/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null; } | while IFS= read -r _R; do _R="${_R%/}"; [ -f "$_R/dist/hook-context.js" ] && { printf '%s\n' "$_R"; break; }; done); [ -n "$_P" ] || { echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'; exit 0; }; node "$_P/dist/hook-context.js"
